rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN'S Motion To Amend Answer. DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2018, Line 6. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Judgment. DENIED. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied as Plaintiff failed to establish that Defendant's first amended answer fails to raise material issue (by denials) or set up an affirmative matter constituting a defense. Maclsaac v. Pozzo (1945) 26 Cal.2d 809. Motion for summary judgment is denied as it is not supported by admissible evidence. Additionally, Plaintiff failed to pay a $500 filing fee for the motion for summary judgment. =(501/ACM)
